Package com.marswars.swerve_lib

package com.marswars.swerve_lib
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.marswars.swerve_lib.module
     
  • Class
    Description
    ChassisRequest
    Container for all the Swerve Requests.
    ChassisRequest.ApplyChassisSpeeds
    Accepts a generic ChassisSpeeds to apply to the drivetrain.
    ChassisRequest.ApplyFieldSpeeds
    Accepts a generic Field Relative ChassisSpeeds to apply to the drivetrain.
    ChassisRequest.ChassisRequestParameters
    Contains everything the control requests need to calculate the module state.
    ChassisRequest.FieldCentric
    Drives the swerve drivetrain in a field-centric manner.
    ChassisRequest.FieldCentricFacingAngle
    Drives the swerve drivetrain in a field-centric manner, maintaining a specified heading angle to ensure the robot is facing the desired direction
    ChassisRequest.Idle
    Does nothing to the swerve module state.
    ChassisRequest.PointWheelsAt
    Sets the swerve drive modules to point to a specified direction.
    ChassisRequest.RobotCentric
    Drives the swerve drivetrain in a robot-centric manner.
    ChassisRequest.RobotCentricFacingAngle
    Applies robot-relative chassis speeds while maintaining a field-centric facing angle.
    ChassisRequest.SwerveDriveBrake
    Sets the swerve drive module states to point inward on the robot in an "X" fashion, creating a natural brake which will oppose any motion.
    ChassisRequest.XPositiveReference
    The reference for "forward" is sometimes different if you're talking about field relative.
    PhoenixOdometryThread
    Provides an interface for asynchronously reading high-frequency measurements to a set of queues.
    SwerveDriveConfig
    Immutable configuration container for a full swerve drivetrain.
    SwerveMeasurements
    Data containers for time-stamped swerve odometry measurements.
    SwerveMeasurements.GyroMeasurement
    Time-stamped gyro measurement.
    SwerveMeasurements.ModuleMeasurement
    Time-stamped module position measurement.
    SwerveMeasurements.SwerveMeasurement
    Aggregated time-stamped swerve measurement bundle.
    SwerveMech
    Mechanism implementation for a four-module swerve drivetrain.
